description: Estonian e-arveldaja (RIK e-Financials) accounting — invoices, bank import, reports.
name: io.github.iseppo/e-arveldaja-mcp

environmentVariables.description: RIK e-arveldaja API key ID. Can alternatively be supplied via a .env file or an apikey*.txt file in the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_API_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: RIK e-arveldaja API public value. Can alternatively be supplied via a .env file or an apikey*.txt file in the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_API_PUBLIC_VALUE

environmentVariables.description: RIK e-arveldaja API password (HMAC signing secret). Can alternatively be supplied via a .env file or an apikey*.txt file in the working directory.
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_API_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Which RIK server to target. "live" (default) or "demo".
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_SERVER

environmentVariables.description: Platform-separated (colon on Linux/macOS, semicolon on Windows) list of directories that file-reading tools are allowed to read from. Defaults to the working directory and the OS temp dir.
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_ALLOWED_PATHS

environmentVariables.description: Set to "1" or "true" to disable MCP progress notifications. Workaround for clients that close the stdio transport when a progress notification arrives after the matching response has been processed.
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_DISABLE_PROGRESS

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a regular file. When set, everything the server writes to stderr is also appended to this file (mode 0o600). Off by default. Cross-platform. Useful when the MCP host swallows stderr. Pipes, devices, sockets, /dev/stdout, and /proc/self/fd/* are refused so the tee cannot corrupt the MCP stdio transport.
environmentVariables.name: EARVELDAJA_LOG_FILE
